title: Announcement for Recruitment of Instructor
content:
Announcements

Details

Announcement for Recruitment of Instructor

An instructor shall be recruited by our institution as per the provisions of "Regulation on Central and Entrance Examinations to be Implemented for Transfer-based or Extramural Appointments in Instructor Posts Excluding Lecturers" published in the Official Gazette dated 31.07.2008 and the requirements stipulated in article 33 of Higher Education Law no.2547.

1-Minimum ALES Score of 70

2-Minimum KPDS, ÜDS, YDS or YÖKDİL score of 80 or an equivalent score in an exam accredited by the Council of Higher Education.

3-Those currently employed in a Higher Education Institution or previously employed for at least 2 years and resigned shall present documentary evidence of their condition.

DOCUMENTS TO BE SUBMITTED ON APPLICATION:

1-Application Petition,

2-Curriculum Vitae in Turkish,

3-Documentation on Education (Photocopies of Bachelor's-MA-PhD diplomas and transcripts)

4-Photocopy of ALES Score

5-Photocopy of KPDS/ÜDS/YDS Score

6-Photocopy of ID

DETAILS OF THE ANNOUNCEMENT;

Application Date: 08.12.2017

Application Deadline: 22.12.2017

Preliminary appraisal Date: 25.12.2017

Date of Entrance Exam: 27.12.2017

- Diplomas received from foreign institutions must be approved for equivalency.

- Those meeting the requirements may submit their applications to the relevant units in person or by mail.

UNIT:

DEPARTMENT

TITLE

NUMBER

SPECIAL REQUIREMENTS

RECTORSHIP

Department of Foreign Languages

Instructor

4

Bachelor's degree in Departments of English Teaching, English Language Teaching, English Language and Literature or Translation and Interpreting (English) and a minimum teaching experience of 2 years
